title: Raghav Chadha’s fallout with AAP explained: From Arvind Kejriwal's trusted aide to a ‘silent’ outsider
description: Chadha's fallout with AAP is certainly not sudden. The Rajya Sabha MP, who was once a prominent AAP face and has been in the Rajya Sabha since 2022, was not included in the party’s list of star campaigners for the coming Assembly elections.
